sample.stopping_rule: run all 16 once; no early stop, replacement, or favorable retry
sample.claim_ceiling: one fixed held-out corpus and one local quantized Qwen3-8B run

multiplicity_policy: The claim attempt passes only if every co-primary condition passes; secondary measures are descriptive and cannot rescue a failed primary gate.

support_transition.pass: eligible_for_bounded_local_support_only after independent validators and book reconciliation
support_transition.fail: preserve refutation or limitation; no support promotion

authorization.local_execution_authority: standing user authority for safe reversible local work

non_claims: No population transfer, general model quality, deployed behavior, safety guarantee, SOTA, AGI, or ASI claim is tested.
Tuning tasks do not enter the confirmatory denominator.
Local effect fixtures do not prove open-system rollback.
